title: The compass defines the governed radius before any line is drawn — constraint precedes action. Precept works the same way: the .precept definition sets every valid boundary before runtime begins. The pivot is the definition; the arc is the only valid circumference; the arms show where the rules reach.
conceptualBridge: The compass means Precept defines exact limits before execution because the tool sets the governed radius before anything can be drawn outside it.
decision: Above threshold; teal palette and V-plus-arc silhouette are genuinely new to the set, but conceptual bridge is one step removed from Precept's prevention guarantee.
